qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing rate limiting on incoming ping frames enables resource exhaustion
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different Yamux root cause: this finding concerns unbounded incoming ping/pong handling, while the advisory concerns WindowUpdate credit addition overflowing per-stream send-window state.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Send window overflow via malicious window updates causes panic and denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same vulnerable code and root cause as the advisory: attacker-controlled Yamux WindowUpdate credit reaches FlowController::increase_send_window_by, overflows per-stream send-window accounting, and panics via expect().

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded memory allocation via stream window auto-tuning enables denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different Yamux flow-control condition: this finding concerns receive-window auto-tuning and memory growth, not malformed WindowUpdate credit overflowing send-window accounting.

selected_finding.title: Send window overflow via malicious window updates causes panic and denial of service

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described Yamux WindowUpdate credit overflow in per-stream send-window accounting. A copied PoC under .judge fed a WindowUpdate SYN followed by a WindowUpdate with credit u32::MAX into yamux 0.13.8, kept the stream alive, and observed the advisory-specific panic in FlowController::increase_send_window_by.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-4w32-2493-32g7 describes remote unauthenticated DoS from malformed Yamux WindowUpdate credit overflowing send-window accounting.

send_window_overflow_panic/vulnerability_report.json names connection.rs:733 and flow_control.rs:179-183, with untrusted frame.header().credit() passed to increase_send_window_by and expect() panicking on checked_add overflow.

.judge/poc_runs/send_window_overflow_panic/run.log shows a WindowUpdate SYN for stream 1, a second WindowUpdate with credit 4294967295, a panic at yamux-0.13.8/src/connection/stream/flow_control.rs:183, and panic message 'send window not to exceed u32'.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC fed Yamux 0.13.8 a valid WindowUpdate SYN to create stream 1, then a WindowUpdate on the live stream with credit 4294967295. The run log shows a panic at connection/stream/flow_control.rs:183 with 'send window not to exceed u32', proving the advisory-described remote DoS condition.
